raw_input: Flood water rising near Shantinagar bridge. 4 people trapped on rooftop. Need rescue boat and first aid.
Fire reported in market lane, smoke spreading, elderly people nearby need evacuation.
Pregnant woman in labour, roads waterlogged, ambulance cannot reach directly.
Shelter camp running short of blankets and tarpaulins before night rain.
Food truck delayed; 220 people in camp have not received dry ration today.
Security concern at warehouse gate during distribution, crowd control requested.
